onboarding.welcomeDescription: Spoony helps you manage your daily energy. No judgement, just a caring tool to support you.
onboarding.spoonsDescription: Each day, you have a limited number of energy "spoons". Spoony helps you allocate them based on your priorities and how you feel.
onboarding.disclaimerDescription: Spoony is an organizational tool, not a medical device. It does not replace professional medical advice. Consult your doctor for any questions about your condition.
onboarding.disclaimerCheckbox: I have read and accept the medical disclaimer
onboarding.previousButtonHint: Go back to the previous step
